assertions.title: Goods page loads as default tab

steps.observed: Redirected to http://localhost:3100/
Goods tab is active/selected in bottom navigation with 5 tabs: Goods, Football, Basketball, Concert, My
Banner carousel with 3 images (World Cup 2026, Cristiano Ronaldo, Sports Merchandise) and navigation buttons
'Find products' search bar visible below carousel
6 product cards in 2-column grid layout with images, names, and prices

evidence.consoleErrors: Pre-existing 'Invalid or unexpected token' from dev server (not related to goods page functionality)

steps.action: Observe banner carousel on Goods page
steps.expected: At least one promotional image visible
steps.observed: 3 banner images visible: World Cup 2026, Cristiano Ronaldo, Sports Merchandise
Carousel advanced to banner 2, second indicator dot highlighted blue, image changed
Previous/Next arrow buttons and 3 dot indicators present and functional

evidence.consoleErrors: none (only pre-existing dev server token error)

assertions.title: Product card grid with images and prices

steps.action: Observe product grid on Goods page
steps.expected: Cards with image, name, and price
steps.observed: 6 product cards each displaying: product image, product name, and price in $XXX.XX format

steps.action: Scroll down to see all products
steps.observed: Successfully scrolled to reveal all 6 products in 2-column grid

assertions.title: Search bar filters products by name

steps.action: Verify initial state with all products
steps.observed: 6 products displayed in grid

steps.expected: Grid filters to show only matching products
steps.observed: Grid filtered to show only 'Lionel Messi #10 Argentina Jersey $149.99' - case-insensitive match confirmed
All 6 products restored in grid

assertions.title: Empty state for no search results

steps.observed: Empty state shown with icon, 'No products found' message, and 'Try a different search term' helper text
Search bar still visible and accessible with search term displayed

steps.action: Observe floating icon on Goods page (top)
steps.observed: Blue chat bubble icon visible at bottom-right of viewport

steps.action: Scroll down to bottom of product grid
steps.observed: Floating icon remains visible at bottom-right after scrolling
Page remains functional, no crash, URL stays at /. Pre-existing dev server error present but unrelated.

evidence.consoleErrors: Pre-existing 'Invalid or unexpected token' (not caused by icon click)

assertions.title: Seed data populates products and events (Goods part only)

steps.observed: 6 products visible: Kylian Mbappé #10 France Jersey ($159.99), Karim Benzema #9 Real Madrid Jersey ($169.99), Mohamed Salah #11 Liverpool Jersey ($154.99), Cristiano Ronaldo #7 Portugal Jersey ($139.99), Neymar Jr #10 Brazil Jersey ($129.99), Lionel Messi #10 Argentina Jersey ($149.99)

frictions.description: First login attempt failed silently - credentials filled via fill command but form fields appeared empty. Required clicking the field first, then filling, for values to register correctly.
frictions.resolution: Explicitly clicked each input field before filling, verified values with get value command, then submitted.

frictions.description: Pre-existing JavaScript error 'Invalid or unexpected token' reported by agent-browser errors command throughout testing. Appears to be a dev server/build issue, not related to any specific assertion functionality.
frictions.resolution: Noted but not blocking - all functionality works correctly despite this error. Console logs show only React DevTools info and Fast Refresh messages.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: all 7 passed. Goods home page loads correctly as default tab with banner carousel (3 images), search bar, product grid (6 products with images, names, and $XXX.XX prices), floating customer service icon, proper search filtering (case-insensitive), empty state for no results, and sufficient seed data (6 products, exceeding 4 minimum).
